en_title: 'Don't Kill the Disc' — Independent Retailer Launches Petition Calling on PlayStation to Keep Physical Games, Gets Over 115,000 Signatures
cn_title: 请愿要求PlayStation保留实体游戏，签名超11.5万
subtitle: 别杀死光盘
opus_summary: 加拿大独立游戏零售商PNP Games发起请愿，要求索尼撤回PlayStation放弃实体光盘的决定。目前请愿已获得超过11.5万个签名。

paragraphs.en: An independent retailer has launched a petition calling on Sony to reverse its decision to ditch discs on PlayStation consoles, garnering over 115,000 signatures so far.
paragraphs.cn: 一家独立零售商发起请愿，呼吁索尼撤回在PlayStation主机上放弃光盘的决定。目前该请愿已获得超过11.5万个签名。

paragraphs.en: PNP Games, a Canadian independent video game retailer, launched the change.org petition asking fans to join it in telling Sony to keep physical PlayStation games. At the time of this article’s publication, the petition had 115,471 signatures.
paragraphs.cn: 加拿大独立电子游戏零售商PNP Games在change.org上发起请愿，邀请玩家一起要求索尼保留PlayStation实体游戏。截至本文发布时，请愿已有115,471个签名。

paragraphs.en: Sony sparked a significant backlash last week for its decision to do away with video game discs on PlayStation consoles from 2028 . Sony’s heavily criticized announcement hit the mainstream with the likes of KFC, Domino’s and even celebrity comedians dunking on it . An IGN poll asking, ‘Do You Support an All-Digital Gaming Future?’ suggests the vast majority of gamers are not in support of Sony’s call here.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼上周决定自2028年起在PlayStation主机上取消电子游戏光盘，引发强烈反弹。这一备受批评的公告已经进入主流讨论，KFC、Domino’s甚至知名喜剧演员都加入了调侃。IGN一项询问「你支持全数字游戏未来吗？」的投票显示，绝大多数玩家并不支持索尼这项决定。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, Sony has come under fire from some developers, publishers, and retailers, the latter of whom stand to lose out when new PlayStation games start coming out with just a download code in a box. Jade Pearce, of PNP Games, pointed to ownership and preservation issues, and said Sony’s decision will cost jobs.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，索尼也遭到部分开发者、发行商和零售商批评。对零售商来说，当新的PlayStation游戏盒内只剩下载码时，他们将成为受损的一方。PNP Games的Jade Pearce指出了所有权和保存问题，并表示索尼的决定会造成岗位流失。

paragraphs.en: “Physical games support an entire industry that an all-digital future quietly erases: retailers, distributors, manufacturers, warehousing and logistics, the pre-owned and trade-in market, and the collector and preservation community,” Pearce said.
paragraphs.cn: Pearce说：「实体游戏支撑着一个完整产业，而全数字未来会悄悄抹去这个产业：零售商、分销商、制造商、仓储与物流、二手和以旧换新市场，以及收藏和保存社群。」

paragraphs.en: “That is thousands of jobs and countless small businesses. Ending physical media removes consumer choice, weakens local economies, and hands a few platform holders total control over how, and whether, you can access the games you buy.
paragraphs.cn: 「这关系到成千上万个工作岗位和无数小企业。终结实体媒介会剥夺消费者选择，削弱地方经济，并把你能否以及如何访问已购买游戏的完全控制权交给少数平台方。」

paragraphs.en: “We are not against digital. We are against digital being the only option. A large and passionate community still wants a real, physical game they own outright, and Sony is about to take that choice away.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们并不反对数字版。我们反对数字版成为唯一选项。仍有一个庞大而热情的群体想要真正、实体、完全属于自己的游戏，而索尼即将夺走这个选择。」

paragraphs.en: The comments on the petition are along the lines you’d expect: very much against Sony’s anti-disc push. “I've been a gamer on the PlayStation platform since the PS1 days, and many of my favorite games have been on PlayStation systems, whether as exclusives or simply a preferred platform,” said Stephen from Sun City Center, Florida. “However, I'm a physical media gamer, and I refuse to support any gaming company that tells me I don't have the option to own physical media. I hope Sony will reverse this decision, but if not, then they will cease to get business from me after January 2028.”
paragraphs.cn: 请愿下方评论的态度不难预料：强烈反对索尼的反光盘方向。来自佛罗里达州Sun City Center的Stephen说：「我从PS1时代起就是PlayStation平台玩家，我喜欢的很多游戏都在PlayStation主机上，无论它们是独占作品，还是那里只是我偏好的平台。不过，我是实体媒介玩家，我拒绝支持任何告诉我不能拥有实体媒介选择权的游戏公司。我希望索尼能撤回这个决定；如果不撤回，那么2028年1月之后，他们就不会再从我这里得到生意。」

paragraphs.en: Sid Shuman, Senior Director, Sony Interactive Entertainment Content Communications, said in a post on PlayStation Blog that the decision was “in response to shifting trends in consumer preference.”
paragraphs.cn: 索尼互动娱乐内容传播高级总监Sid Shuman在PlayStation Blog的一篇文章中表示，这项决定是「为了回应消费者偏好变化趋势」。

paragraphs.en: “This is a natural direction for Sony Interactive Entertainment to adapt to consumer trends as the general preference for digital media significantly outpaces physical discs,” Shuman continued. “This transition will enable us to align more closely with how most of our community prefers to access and play games today.”
paragraphs.cn: Shuman继续说道：「随着用户对数字媒介的普遍偏好显著超过实体光盘，这是索尼互动娱乐适应消费趋势的自然方向。这次转型将让我们更贴近如今大多数社群访问和游玩游戏的偏好。」

paragraphs.en: Piers Harding-Rolls, games industry analyst at Ampere, has said the data backs this up, and that a lot has changed over the course of the last two generations. "Console gaming is the last hold-out for physical media in the gaming sector, but physical product has been declining in importance," he said in a post on the Ampere website . "Back in 2013 when the PS4 launched, Ampere data shows that only 13% of total full games unit sales for Sony consoles were digital (including digital-only games). Fast forward to 2025, and this digital share of full game purchases stood at almost 80% of the total.
paragraphs.cn: Ampere游戏行业分析师Piers Harding-Rolls表示，数据支持这一说法，过去两代主机期间已经发生了很多变化。他在Ampere网站发文称：「主机游戏是游戏行业实体媒介最后的阵地，但实体产品的重要性一直在下降。2013年PS4发布时，Ampere数据显示索尼主机完整游戏销量中只有13%来自数字版（包括仅数字发行的游戏）。快进到2025年，这一完整游戏购买中的数字占比已经接近80%。」

paragraphs.en: "Inevitably there will be concerns from PlayStation gamers around various aspects of this announcement including choice, accessing older physical games on new consoles, the ability to collect physical games, and game preservation, however the purchasing trends of gamers are clear."
paragraphs.cn: 「PlayStation玩家难免会对这项公告的多个方面感到担忧，包括选择权、在新主机上访问旧实体游戏、收藏实体游戏的能力以及游戏保存。不过，玩家的购买趋势是明确的。」

paragraphs.en: Harding-Rolls also suggests Sony has money on its mind. Selling games digitally makes games companies more money than selling games in boxes, where publishers take about 50% of the sale price. Sony takes a 30% cut of game sales on the PlayStation Store, leaving 70% for publishers. When PlayStation goes 100% digital from 2028 onwards, the game companies including Sony will make more money overall from software sales.
paragraphs.cn: Harding-Rolls还认为，索尼考虑的是钱。相比销售盒装游戏，数字销售能让游戏公司赚到更多。盒装游戏中，发行商大约拿走售价的50%；而PlayStation Store游戏销售中，索尼抽成30%，发行商拿走70%。当PlayStation自2028年起全面数字化后，包括索尼在内的游戏公司整体会从软件销售中赚到更多。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, ditching a disc drive would in theory make the PS6 cheaper to produce amid the ongoing RAMpocalypse fueled by the AI boom. Analysts believe the PS6 will launch late 2028, given PlayStation will ditch discs from January of that year.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，在AI热潮推动、内存价格危机持续的背景下，放弃光驱理论上会降低PS6生产成本。鉴于PlayStation将从2028年1月起放弃光盘，分析师认为PS6会在2028年底发布。

paragraphs.en: The question is, will Sony reverse its decision? Will petitions like this one and all the online backlash have any impact at all? It seems unlikely. Sony’s share price enjoyed a bump following the announcement, which suggests the market is in favor of it (unsurprising, given it will in theory make the company more money). One analyst said fans of physical media had their chance and blew it, so there’s no going back. “If gamers and preservationists had bought more physical games, Sony wouldn’t have seen the digital sales ratios that justify this decision,” Robin Zhu, a games analyst at Bernstein, told the Financial Times .
paragraphs.cn: 问题在于，索尼会撤回决定吗？这样的请愿和网上反弹会产生任何影响吗？看起来不太可能。公告发布后，索尼股价有所上涨，这表明市场支持这项决定（考虑到它理论上会让公司赚更多钱，这并不意外）。一位分析师表示，实体媒介粉丝曾有机会，但他们错过了，因此已经没有回头路。Bernstein游戏分析师Robin Zhu对《金融时报》表示：「如果玩家和保存主义者购买了更多实体游戏，索尼就不会看到足以支撑这项决定的数字销售比例。」

paragraphs.en: “Digital game sales carry essentially 100% incremental margin... the cost of the physical package, shipping and retailer margins can be more than 20% per cent of sticker price.”
paragraphs.cn: 「数字游戏销售基本上带来100%的增量利润率……实体包装、运输和零售商利润可能超过标价的20%。」

paragraphs.en: Photo by YUICHI YAMAZAKI/AFP via Getty Images.
paragraphs.cn: 图片来源：YUICHI YAMAZAKI/AFP via Getty Images。
